meta.notes: v1.4: Brand lockstep with LinkedIn header. headline updated to 'AI Governance & Ethics | Digital Transformation | 15+ Years Enterprise IT Experience'. Corrected employer name TransAlta Corporation -> TransAlta Utilities. Source resume is now Resume_Roy_Aggarwal_Summer_2026.docx. No skills, scoring fields, or prompt touched; ran run_calibration.py to confirm no scoring drift. v1.3: Promoted hands-on builder competencies (Agentic AI Development, Python, LLM/Agent Orchestration, Prompt Engineering) from the Agentic Job Search project's skills_demonstrated into top-level skills.technical so the scorer credits hands-on building, not just governance/strategy. Positioning intentionally stays business/governance-led (~75% soft/business, 25% technical); the agentic system is the prime technical example. v1.2: Corrected employment dates throughout. Adjusted years_experience per skill to reflect actual tenure. total_years_experience updated to 17 (formal). Headline updated to over 15 years. Web dev business period 2012-2020 not listed as formal employment.

identity.name: Roy Aggarwal
identity.headline: AI Governance & Ethics | Digital Transformation | 15+ Years Enterprise IT Experience
identity.positioning_statement: I help organizations translate complex technology into aligned, governed, and business-ready outcomes at the intersection of enterprise systems and responsible AI.

soft_skills: Translating complex technology for non-technical stakeholders
Managing execution risk during critical transitions

experience.title: Digital Transformation Lead | Change Agent
experience.summary: Led complete digital transformation for a non-profit heritage organization, delivering measurable outcomes across web, database, governance, and stakeholder engagement.

achievements.text: Spearheaded website redevelopment achieving 300% traffic growth and top search rankings through strategic SEO and UX optimization.
Architected albertaancestors.ca from concept to deployment: 250,000+ genealogy records with data governance protocols and QA processes.
Managed databases for 300+ cemeteries; standardized data entry and validation rules across multiple data sources.
Engaged board-level executives and volunteers, building consensus around technology initiatives and communicating technical concepts accessibly.
Developed training materials enabling non-technical volunteers to operate website, database, and content workflows independently.

experience.title: Business Intelligence Liaison | Enterprise Systems Analyst
experience.summary: Primary bridge between enterprise BI teams and business stakeholders at a major Canadian railway; contributed to multi-million dollar SAP deployments.

achievements.text: Served as primary liaison between BI technical teams and business stakeholders, translating capabilities into value propositions.
Selected to collaborate with SAP Value Engineering Division on multi-million dollar enterprise BI strategy and implementation roadmaps.
Led requirements gathering workshops for enterprise BI, identifying analytics needs and prioritizing development efforts.
Produced BRDs and process flow diagrams that became organizational templates for subsequent enterprise initiatives.
Managed change management for major system rollouts: training, communications, and user adoption monitoring.

experience.title: Enterprise Systems Analyst | Data Management Lead
experience.summary: Led enterprise system upgrades and data management at a major Alberta energy company.

achievements.text: Led enterprise system upgrades coordinating cross-functional teams for successful deployment with minimal business disruption.
Managed data integrity and QA for critical enterprise systems; developed automated validation protocols.
Designed reporting frameworks and analytics dashboards for executive decision-making, translating complex operational data into actionable insights.
Coordinated system upgrade projects managing timelines, budgets, and resource allocation while maintaining service levels.
Developed comprehensive user training programs and supporting documentation.

projects.name: albertaancestors.ca
projects.description: Architected and built a custom 250,000+ record genealogy platform from concept to deployment for the Alberta Family Histories Society. Includes data governance protocols, QA processes, and volunteer-operated content workflows.

projects.name: AI-YYC Portfolio Site
projects.description: Personal professional portfolio at ai-yyc.com positioning expertise in digital transformation, AI governance, and ethics. Demonstrates SEO strategy, web development, and personal brand execution.

projects.name: Agentic Job Search System
projects.description: Designed and built a fully autonomous agentic job search pipeline in Python. Ingests LinkedIn and Indeed job alerts via IMAP, scrapes full job descriptions using Playwright, scores each posting against a structured career profile using Claude Haiku, and automatically generates tailored ATS-compliant resumes and cover letters using Claude Sonnet for high-scoring matches. Delivers results via Telegram bot with approve/reject/regenerate commands. Runs autonomously at 5:00am daily via Windows Task Scheduler.

education.notable: Focus: Ethical AI System Design, AI Governance, Human-Centred AI. Graduating August 2026. Directly applicable to AI governance and responsible AI roles.

education.degree: Masters Certificate in Business Analysis (IIBA Accredited)
education.notable: Requirements analysis, stakeholder management, business process modeling. IIBA accreditation is industry-recognized.
Business strategy, financial analysis, market research.
Practical foundation in web development, UX, and digital delivery. Applied directly in albertaancestors.ca and ai-yyc.com builds.

achievements_highlight: Supported multi-million dollar enterprise BI deployments in collaboration with SAP Value Engineering at Canadian Pacific Railway.
Led website redevelopment achieving 300% traffic growth and top search rankings.
Architected albertaancestors.ca: 250,000+ record genealogy platform with governance and data quality frameworks.
Over 15 years of formal enterprise IT experience across Alberta energy, transportation, and non-profit sectors.
Completing SAIT AI certificate specializing in ethical AI design, governance frameworks, and human-centred implementation.
Consistently effective in regulated, high-stakes environments where stakeholder alignment and execution discipline are critical.

Designed and built a fully autonomous agentic job search system using Python, Claude (Anthropic), Playwright, and Telegram, processing job alerts, scoring matches against a career profile, and generating tailored application documents without human intervention.

value_proposition.summary: IT and business leader with over 15 years of formal enterprise experience, now focused on helping organizations adopt AI ethically, responsibly, and with clear business impact.
differentiators: Bridge between business and technical teams: not purely technical, not purely strategic
Regulated industry depth: energy (TransAlta) and transportation (CP Rail) experience
AI governance expertise with formal education (SAIT AI certificate) plus practical application
Proven delivery in resource-constrained environments (non-profit, regulated enterprise)
Consistent track record of delivering complex systems across multiple sectors

voice.signature_phrase: Execution, not technology, is where transformation succeeds or fails.
voice.positioning_statement: I help organizations translate complex technology into aligned, governed, and business-ready outcomes at the intersection of enterprise systems and responsible AI.
phrases_to_use: at the intersection of enterprise systems and responsible AI
over 15 years of enterprise IT experience
voice.cover_letter_opening_style: Lead with a direct statement connecting the role's specific need to your experience. Avoid generic openers. Reference the intersection of governance and execution immediately.
